ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_key" TEXT /* Key that identifies the issue within the system */,
  "t_bug" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue is a bug */,
  "t_suggestion" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue is a suggestion */,
  "t_sub_task" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue is a sub-task */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to the issue */,
  "estimated_effort" INTEGER /* Estimated effort required to resolve the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels or tags associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "plugin_name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "plugin_type" TEXT /* Type of the plugin (e.g., reporting, CI/CD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plugin */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the plugin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_plugins" (
  "issue_plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue-plugin association */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue linked to the plugin */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin linked to the issue */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the association is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_plugins_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_plugins_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_status" (
  "issue_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue-status association */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue linked to the status */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status linked to the issue */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_status_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_status_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue linked to the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue assigned to the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priority_levels" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priorities" (
  "issue_priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue-priority association */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue linked to the priority level */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level linked to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_priorities_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priority_levels ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_priorities_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dependency */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that depends on another issue */,
  "dependent_issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that is depended on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
